_comment: Deployment constants for the GIP-151 redemption pipeline. Edit this file to move from the preview fork to production — the scripts read it, nothing is hardcoded. RPC URLs are NOT here: they live in .env (the Tenderly fork URL is a credential). See config.ts for the validation rules.
_depositContract: Deployed RedemptionDeposit. gno/osgno/safe/osgnoRate/deadline are read FROM it — never restated here, so they cannot drift from chain.
_deployBlock: Block the deposit contract was deployed at — where the Deposited event scan starts. Too high silently drops early deposits (the totalDeposited reconciliation catches it and aborts).
_logStep: getLogs range per request. Public Gnosis RPCs allow 10000; Tenderly virtual RPCs reject anything above ~1000. Override with LOG_STEP env.
_payoutTokens: THE ASSETS TO DISTRIBUTE (GIP-151 basket, all on Gnosis chain). The Safe is funded with exactly the amounts to hand out, so each token's FULL Safe balance becomes its basket leg, split pro-rata by deposit stake. A token the Safe holds that is NOT listed here is distributed to NOBODY — it stays in the Safe and depositors are under-paid. Every address + symbol + decimals below was verified on-chain (Gnosis) and is re-asserted at runtime by verify-tokens.ts and when treasury-basket.ts reads the basket, so a wrong address throws instead of silently contributing a zero balance. Symbols are the EXACT on-chain strings (note lowercase 'auraBAL'). GNO (0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb) and osGNO (0xF490c80aAE5f2616d3e3BDa2483E30C4CB21d1A0) must never be listed: the Safe holds them because deposits are forwarded to it, so they ARE the deposits, not the proceeds.
